You missed option D: D correct: this correctly breaks down the rules by task type.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please update day30/api_changelog.md: add a new section for Sprint 10 Week 1 documenting three new endpoints added this week — POST /export/json, POST /export/csv, and GET /metrics/sprint. Include the date each endpoint was added.

[Wed 2026-03-18 11:28 EDT] [Previous Feedback] You missed option B: B correct: the order of completing the two tasks (board update vs new report) is flexible as long as .bak always precedes its corresponding modification.
You missed option D: D correct: this correctly breaks down the rules by task type.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please update day30/api_changelog.md: add a new section for Sprint 10 Week 1 documenting three new endpoints added this week — POST /export/json, POST /export/csv, and GET /metrics/sprint. Include the date each endpoint was added.

# Project Orion API Changelog

Last Updated: April 17, 2026

## Sprint 9 (2026-04-07 to 2026-04-17)

### New Endpoints
- `GET /tasks/filter` — Filter tasks by priority and status
- `POST /dashboard/widgets` — Create custom dashboard widgets
- `GET /export/preview` — Preview data export (beta)

### Breaking Changes
None in this sprint.

Last Updated: April 24, 2026

## Sprint 10 Week 1 (2026-04-20 to 2026-04-24)

### New Endpoints
- `POST /export/json` — Export project data as JSON (added: 2026-04-21)
- `POST /export/csv` — Export project data as CSV (added: 2026-04-22)
- `GET /metrics/sprint` — Retrieve sprint performance metrics (added: 2026-04-23)

### Breaking Changes
None in this sprint.

## Sprint 9 (2026-04-07 to 2026-04-17)

- `GET /export/preview` — Preview data export (beta)

None in this sprint.
